articles.title: New data shows Sony has been selling fewer and fewer copies of its PlayStation exclusives since 2020 - Eurogamer
articles.description: Newly-collated data on the sales performance of Sony's first-party PlayStation titles paints a grim picture.

articles.title: New ‘Crimson Desert’ Roadmap Says It Will Patch The Story - Forbes
articles.description: Crimson Desert has undergone many fixes and seen many additions, but changing the lackluster story seemed impossible. Maybe not, according to a new roadmap.

articles.title: PlayStation State Of Play: What Time, Where To Watch, What To Expect - Forbes
articles.description: Here's what time PlayStation's State of Play is today, where to watch and everything we might be able to expect, and not expect, from the show.

articles.title: Gemini Spark is the most impressive and terrifying AI experience I’ve had yet - The Verge
articles.description: Gemini Spark, Google’s new agentic AI platform, can accomplish tasks around the web and even soon on your devices. It works astonishingly well — maybe too well.

articles.title: Studio Founded By Forza Horizon 5 Director Announces Open-World Action-Driving Game Clutch - Game Informer
articles.description: The game is set to launch on PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC in spring 2027.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro Battery Capacities Allegedly Leaked - MacRumors
articles.description: Battery capacities for Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro have allegedly surfaced, and the numbers suggest only a modest increase over the iPhone 17...
